commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair lane is needed because there are no actionable patch defects; ordinary maintainer docs review and branch-protection checks are the remaining path.; Cleared: The final diff changes Markdown docs, docs navigation, and a public llms index only; it adds no dependencies, workflows, scripts, secrets handling, or package execution path. commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a ClawHub plugin-development docs page, restores a Build docs tab, and routes plugin validation guidance to canonical OpenClaw authoring docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs navigation/linking PR, not a bug report. The observable behavior is the rendered docs page, navigation placement, and canonical links, which the PR reports validating with docs build, smoke, link checks, static checks, and local render verification.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed because there are no actionable patch defects; ordinary maintainer docs review and branch-protection checks are the remaining path.

target.title: docs: link to canonical OpenClaw plugin guides
target.body:
## Summary

- replace the mirrored OpenClaw plugin SDK and skill-authoring corpus with one concise ClawHub plugin-development entry point
- restore a top-level `Build` docs tab for plugin and skill authoring, while keeping ClawHub publishing and validation under `Use`
- link directly to the canonical OpenClaw plugin system, building, SDK, manifest, testing, capability-specific, and skill-authoring guides
- link to `openclaw/plugin-inspector` as the current inspection implementation
- keep ClawHub-specific validation and publishing guidance local while routing SDK remediation references to OpenClaw
- document that ClawHub should link to OpenClaw authoring docs rather than mirror them

The final PR diff is six files: 110 additions and 37 deletions. The mirror pages, mirror-specific renderer changes, and extraction/sync ownership spec are no longer part of the PR.

## Verification

- `bun run docs:build` -> built 18 pages; indexed 17 pages / 2315 words
- `bun run docs:smoke` -> `ClawHub docs smoke ok`
- `bun run ci:static` -> passed
- rendered `http://127.0.0.1:4174/plugin-development` and verified the `Build` tab, authoring sidebar groups, canonical links, and ClawHub publishing handoff on desktop and mobile
- all linked OpenClaw documentation pages and `openclaw/plugin-inspector` returned HTTP 200
- `git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main HEAD` -> clean
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
